I will be changing it to be less of a generic habitable safe haven level, give it more lore, that stuff. |author=Astral(And before this current version, Solus.) |rewriter=Astral |progress=40% }}
» PIERCING THE CLOUDS «
{{Class Custom Image|class=0|bg-image=Cyanbg.jpg|bg-size=1500px|safety=Safe|security=Secure|entity=Devoid of Hostile Entities|hexagon=0|text-color=white}} {{Audio|file=Cuhlamity.mp3|volume=0.25|secrettext=skibidi toilet is in your walls|align=center}} {{Audio|file=Windd.mp3|volume=0.2|secrettext=what?|align=center}} Description{{Underline|ffffff}} {{Blurimage|file=Yeahchicagotothebackrooms.jpg|width=200px|align=right|caption=Serenity.}} '''Level 97''' is a vast expanse of white stratus clouds that stretch across a seemingly infinite plane. Dotting the clouds are a set of skyscrapers with varying heights, their sleek metallic materials glinting faintly. The level is permeated by a cool, gentle breeze that carries with it the soft, almost melodic sound of the wind. Occasionally, faint, shimmering rainbows can be seen arcing across the horizon, though they often vanish as quickly as they appear. The clouds themselves carry a faint ripple akin to an ocean. A distinct feature of '''Level 97''' is its surprisingly low gravity, which allows wanderers to float effortlessly through the air. Many describe a feeling of weightlesness, not bound by gravity. Movement through the level often resembles the sensation of swimming in water, with graceful, fluid motions. However, it is possible for one to become disoriented and lose their sense of direction, though this disorientation is usually temporary. Deep beneath the sea of clouds lies an invisible yet impenetrable barrier. This prevents the wanderer and other beings from interacting with whatever lies below, which is currently unknown. Upon approaching the barrier, one will notice their surroundings starting to take on a reddish hue. Should one attempt to move closer, a powerful gust of wind will manifest, blowing the wanderer back up to skyscraper height. Any pictures taken or sounds recorded near this barrier become distorted, with it intensifying as one approaches closer to it. The skyscrapers are typically impossible to enter, with windows that are made of impenetrable glass and steel. However, under specific conditions or with the use of the right tools, it is possible to enter these structures. Inside, wanderers encounter a variety of spaces, including modern offices, hotel suites, and observation decks offering views of the sea of clouds. On the rooftops of the skyscrapers, wanderers can find supply crates containing food, water, and other necessities, making '''Level 97''' an ideal level for gathering resources. When night falls in '''Level 97''', the skyscrapers illuminate a vibrant array of hues, their windows emanating a plethora of colors. Spotlights of various hues emerge from the sea of clouds below and sweep across the skies, which soon become dotted with countless stars. Bases and Outposts{{Underline|ffffff}} One base exists within this level. That being '''Base Equilibrium''', the primary outpost for the '''[[V.C.U.|Void Control Unit (VCU)]]'''. This group has managed to enter the interior of one of the tallest skyscrapers, declaring it their base of operations. Members of the '''V.C.U.''' have adapted the structure into a functioning headquarters, conducting research. Entrances and Exits{{Underline|ffffff}} Wanderers can enter '''Level 97''' by noclipping through specific locations, such as the windows of '''[[Level 95]]''' or certain points within the '''[[Absolute Infinity Of Unknown]]'''. Additionally, noclipping through '''[[Level 75]]'''’s invisible barrier leads to the lower parts of '''Level 97''', though the wanderer will immediately be pushed back up by the gusts of wind. Exiting '''Level 97''' typically involves the skyscrapers. The destination level depends on the architectural style of the building entered. For instance, skyscrapers with a futuristic design may lead to '''[[Level 833]]'''. Another exit is finding within some accessible skyscrapers a long deep, specific staircase going downwards with signs pointing to a "Dining Area", leading to the interior of a restaurant within '''[[Level 98]]''' after descending for long enough. A person cannot re-enter '''Level 97''' after using this same staircase to enter '''[[Level 98]]''', as it will turn into a normal staircase leading to any upper floor, part or area of a restaurant. A rarer exit is the appearance of a seemingly floating door in the cloud plane; entering it will lead to one of the houses of [[Level 112]]. {{Collapse|num=1|initial=''' ... '''|final=''' ... '''|body=
'''''Beneath the clouds, where the skyscrapers pierce the skies,''''' '''''A place unknown, sealed by a barrier coated in crimson hues.''''' '''''What lies beyond the mysterious veil,''''' '''''Forever known as a vague mystery.''''' =='''''
